creator: bedo@ezway.eu
text:
Not sure what info might help. please advise.

I was running previous version of gitlab 12.0.6 just for 2 days as a test. As new version become available yesterday, i removed old version via pkg delete gitlab-ce && pkg autoremove

Also removed ruby25 with all gems.
Installed ruby26 (and updated /etc/make.conf to ruby=2.6)
Then tried to install gitlab-ce, after fail tried again with MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE.
